name: Compliance & audit
description: CQC-oriented governance layer: merged audit timeline across CAD, clinical records, and admin activity; PIN-gated exports with immutable export log.

changes: compliance_policies domain: timeline and exports include comp_policy_lifecycle_audit (policy lifecycle, issue, retire, unpublish) with policy title.
Domain selection: ca_filter_applied distinguishes default-all vs explicit no-sources; merge_timeline uses None vs empty set; export scope serializes domains for audit trail.
Governance export log events use domain key governance_exports; PDF summary shows human domain labels; timeline text search includes detail_ref / action / entity_type.
Hardening: export format allow-list, scheduled job toggle/delete job_id validation, export log insert try/except, scheduled domain JSON sanitized to known keys, warn on zero-row scheduled run.
Assurance timeline and exports: epcr_clinical_audit (audit_logs) and epcr_access (access request workflow), aligned with Medical Records clinical audit sources.
eDiscovery: compliance_evidence_matters, timeline/export by matter_id, optional matter_reference on exports.
SIEM bridge: dashboard, GET /api/siem-snapshot and /api/audit-events with session or COMPLIANCE_AUDIT_SIEM_TOKEN.
